title: Trump officials hire ‘deportation judges’ with less training, experience - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Trump officials hire ‘deportation judges’ with less training, experience
Kerry Doyle was recently featured in The Washington Post discussing recent changes within the immigration court system, including the dismissal and hiring of immigration judges. In the article, Doyle shared her perspective on the importance of maintaining judicial independence and safeguarding due process in immigration proceedings, noting concerns that personnel decisions may influence the neutrality of the courts. Her commentary underscores the broader implications these changes may have for public confidence in the immigration system and the fair administration of justice.
